raw_consumer_statement: Hello, this is my XXXX ( FIFTH ) complaint regarding Amex 's illegal actions. Previous ones : # # XXXX, XXXX, XXXX, and XXXX. I am filing a formal complaint regarding XXXX XXXX mishandling of a fraud case involving an Amex XXXX Credit Card issued in my name. Now they are harassing me with spam calls from XXXX. I applied for the card in XX/XX/year> but never received it. On XX/XX/year>, the XXXX, MA Police ( Case # XXXX, Det. XXXX XXXX, XXXX ) informed me the card had been found in another individuals possession. I then discovered numerous unauthorized transactions in states I have never visited. Amex admitted the card had been pre-activated and that a second card was issued without my request. I immediately reported the fraud, asked that all cards be cancelled, and provided police information. Despite this, Amex falsely claimed I had not cancelled the stolen card, left the account active, and later refused to reverse the charges. Fraudulent transactions continued in Oklahoma and elsewhere, even though I had also submitted an FTC Identity Theft Report and a second police report from the XXXX ( Case # XXXX ). Both were ignored. Amex repeatedly sent contradictory letters, closed my case citing insufficient information, and claimed they were unable to reach medespite my documented calls and records proving otherwise. Their failure to cancel the account, disregard of police investigations, and refusal to reverse fraudulent charges demonstrate gross negligence. There's a pending NY XXXX complaint as well. Their actions contradict the last letter I received here ( attached response ). Ref : XXXX Accounts Ending in XXXX & XXXX I respectfully request your office investigate this matter and refer it to the CFPB as appropriate. I JUST WANT THEM TO LEAVE ME ALONE. I have preserved all communications, call recordings, and documents and can provide them upon request. Sincerely, XXXX XXXX
